tools.name: analyze_metrics
tools.description: Submit startup metrics to detect matching failure patterns

tools.name: audit_decision
tools.description: Evaluate a proposed decision against historical failure cases

parameters.decision: string — describe what the founder is considering
parameters.metrics: object — current startup metrics (same fields as analyze_metrics)

tools.name: get_pattern_details
tools.description: Get full details of a specific failure pattern including playbook

tools.name: list_all_patterns
tools.description: List all failure patterns in the library
